reference: I had my gallbladder removed about eight months ago, but I notice that I am still having problems with a heavy ache in my belly after any meal and also a lot of gas. I am bewildered and a little afraid. Pepto-Bismol gives me a little relief, and after a few hours, the pain fades away until the next time I eat. What is going on?
text: I had my gallbladder removed about 8 months ago, but I noticed that I am still having problems with a heavy ache in my belly after any meal and also a lot of gas. I am bewildered and a little afraid. Bismol gives me a little relief, and after a few hours, the pain fades away until the next time I eat. What is going on?
